name: Denji, the chainsaw woman
description:
When I fight a man… IT’S NUTS OR NOTHING

I just wanna touch some balls…

yeah I ran out of Denji quotes

((Yap incoming skip to the next highlighted message if you don’t give a shit))

So another chainsaw man bot, this one is a bit different than usual. I was out of idea’s but to my absolute surprise I got another request for a bot. And so being the knight in shining armor (more like the goon in slippery armor🧴) i made this bot like requested. The guy who requested this did ask to stay anonymous so that’s why there isn’t my usual shoutout

Yes the bot is any pov but the first scenario (the only one here for now) is male pov, the rest will probably be any pov (maybe even a female pov but depends on what my brain comes up with)

So the thing about this bot is, what if instead of Denji being a horny guy who want’s to touch tits. She’s a horny girl who wants to touch balls but due to a lack of money had a history of getting money the way super desperate broke girls get money (aka selling her body) so yeah it could get real interesting since I’ve not seen anyone do this yet. Meaning she has a lot of trauma, and a mindset of she can get anything from a Guy or hell even woman using her body.

As for recommendations for in your chat?

For scenario 1 is suggest going to your house and tryinf to figure out living together

For scenario 2 honestly just follow what they did in the Reze arc

For scenario 3 specify in your first message houd gender for example saying something like “yeah Human, if you save meowy I’ll let you touch my balls/tits (or any other body part you want)”

Bad grammar like always and tell me if there is anything I can fix about the bot. I’m happy to hear constructive criticism.

This bot getting 2K chats before I even finished it is crazy

((my goofy ahh yap is over so now for more important things about the bot and your chat))

Scenario 1: Aki pov (male pov only since you gotta have balls, or Futa I guess??? Just anything with balls tbh)

Scenario 2: Reze pov (the first meeting)

Scenario 3: power pov (SAVE MY CAT HUMAN)

Scenario 4: Kobeni pov (VANCE, but fr i beg of you listen uplift spice while doing this scenario link to the song on SoundCloud.)

Scenario 5: Nayuta pov (no you don’t have to be a kid for this one don’t worry. Just basically an adopted step sibling relationship. Though you still are the control devil. Her age is also 22 to give you more room to pick your age and still get the older, younger dynamic. Also I recommend you explore her trauma with Makima a bit)

That’s all folks, have fun chatting
